response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video for any vocal music. 2. Determined that the background music in the montage section (00:00-04:45) is entirely instrumental. 3. Examined the stage view section (04:45-05:01) and found only crowd noise and a spoken announcement, not a sung song. 4. Concluded that no vocal music is present in the video, thus no lyrics searches were performed.
response.global_summary: The video is a montage of fan-submitted messages and artwork celebrating the 'hololive Live 2026 First MISSION' concert. It features instrumental background music throughout the message display portion, followed by a brief cut to a live concert stage with an audience. There is no vocal music performed in this video.

scenes.description: A montage of static images displaying fan messages and artwork for 'hololive Live 2026 First MISSION', accompanied by instrumental background music.
The camera cuts to a view of the concert stage with an audience. At the very end, an announcement is made: 'HONJITSU GA'.
